parity_goal: Turn explicit ChatGPT requests into clear orders while keeping the local agent canonical and ChatGPT returns clearly bounded.
behavior_signature_before: Ambient ChatGPT policy spread across prompts or docs with no dedicated routing surface.
behavior_signature_after: Node-first ChatGPT router with explicit order phrasing, lane selection, and preserved trust boundary.

cases.prompt: $chatgpt research the vendor landscape for X and draft the right order
Place a ChatGPT order to have Agent collect the pricing details from the website
$chatgpt give me a second-pass review on this architecture decision
$chatgpt what time is it right now in Springfield
